step_rationale: Renal dysfunction and systemic organ-injury marker; off-pathway CVD biomarker.
mechanism: Kidney injury molecule-1 reflects renal dysfunction and systemic ischemic injury independent of the atherothrombotic cascade.

references.title: Plasma Protein Profiling of Incident Cardiovascular Diseases: A Multisample Evaluation.
Large-Scale Plasma Protein Profiling of Incident Myocardial Infarction, Ischemic Stroke, and Heart Failure.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association

references.title: Prognostic impact of established and novel renal function biomarkers in myocardial infarction with cardiogenic shock: A biomarker substudy of the IABP-SHOCK II-trial.
